title: Dataset on the evolution of mosquito-borne diseases in Latin America and the Car
description:
Dataset on the evolution of mosquito-borne diseases in Latin America and the Caribbean 2015-2024. Includes data on Dengue, Zika, Chikungunya, and Malaria by country (Brazil, Colombia, Mexico, Peru, Argentina, Venezuela and others), with reported case

DOI: https://github.com/juanmoisesd/evolution-of-mosquito-borne-diseases-in-latin-america-2015-2024-database-by-coun
GitHub: https://github.com/juanmoisesd/evolution-of-mosquito-borne-diseases-in-latin-america-2015-2024-database-by-coun
Author: de la Serna, Juan Moisés
